india_trends.summary: The lender said the transition to the expected credit loss system will be staggered over 4–5 years.

india_trends.summary: May allow exchanges to add intraday options strikes in order to improve trading efficiency

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Wednesday
india_trends.summary: Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex declined amid selling in banking, auto and IT stocks. Markets remain range-bound, awaiting triggers, with analysts highlighting key support and resistance levels while global cues and cautious sentiment continue to influence near-term direction.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: JPMorgan CEO says not worried about inflation, risks remain of higher prices
india_trends.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon ​said on Tuesday he is not worried about ​inflation, but added among the worst-case scenarios for the economy is the risk of stagflation.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: HSBC turns bullish on US equities citing earnings momentum
india_trends.summary: HSBC upgraded U.S. equities to "overweight" from "neutral," citing strong earnings momentum and easing geopolitical risks. The brokerage also downgraded Europe ex-UK to "neutral" due to weaker activity and higher energy price risks. HSBC favors sectors with lower commodity input costs like banks, in

india_trends.title: Sapphire Foods bets on KFC value meals to drive traffic amid weak demand
india_trends.summary: Sapphire Foods is pivoting to a permanent value-pricing model for KFC to stimulate transaction growth amid a sluggish consumer environment. The strategy precedes a merger with Devyani International, aimed at consolidating India’s QSR market and capturing operational synergy.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold drops $125/oz, silver falls $3/oz as crude rally fuels inflation fears
india_trends.summary: On 28 April, gold and silver prices sharply declined amid rising inflation worries from escalating crude oil prices and stalled US-Iran negotiations. Gold futures hit a month-low, and silver fell significantly, as prospects for peace talks dwindled.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Airtel eyes $2 billion London IPO of mobile money unit
india_trends.summary: Airtel Money, Airtel Africa's mobile money arm, is planning a significant initial public offering. The listing could raise between $1.5 billion and $2 billion. London is emerging as the preferred location for this major financial event. This move aims to value Airtel Money at up to $10 billion, posi

india_trends.title: Maruti loses market share despite higher sales, stays unfazed
india_trends.summary: India’s biggest carmaker sold 2.4 million cars in FY26, up 8% year-on-year (y-o-y), with domestic sales rising 4% to 1.97 million units, and exports climbing 35% to nearly 450,000 units.

india_trends.summary: Nifty 50 remains range-bound between key support and resistance levels, indicating indecision and awaiting directional cues. Analysts expect breakout beyond current bands, while several stocks show strong technical setups with bullish momentum, breakouts, and upside potential across sectors.

india_trends.title: Dalmia Bharat's profit jumps, flags war-led cost pressures
india_trends.summary: For the financial year ended 31 March 2026 (FY26), the company saw its net profit jump more than 65% to ₹1,158 crore on the back of better realisations and a moderate rise in costs.

india_trends.title: Bandhan Bank Q4 profit surges as asset quality improves and NPAs fall
india_trends.summary: Bandhan Bank reported a strong quarterly profit jump driven by lower provisions and improved asset quality. Gross NPAs declined significantly, margins improved, and loan growth remained steady, while the bank also strengthened its secured lending portfolio and deposit base.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: Rare Earths Americas kicks off US IPO roadshow with $368 million valuation target
india_trends.summary: Rare Earths ‌Americas kicked off ⁠the roadshow ⁠for its U.S. initial public offering on Tuesday, aiming for a valuation of up to $368.4 million, as ​investor interest surges in critical minerals used in products from electric vehicles to iPhones.

india_trends.title: Homebuyers 'fraud': ED attaches Raheja Developers' assets worth over Rs 1,110 crore
india_trends.summary: The Enforcement Directorate has attached assets exceeding Rs 1,100 crore linked to Raheja Developers. This action is part of a money-laundering investigation concerning alleged fraud against homebuyers. The agency seized bullion and foreign currency during recent searches. Funds collected from over

india_trends.title: US stocks today: Barrick names top executives at new North American business post IPO
india_trends.summary: Barrick Mining named Wessel Hamman as ‌chief financial ⁠officer of ⁠the new company that will hold its North American assets after its IPO, adding ​on Tuesday that Tim Cribb will serve as chief operating officer.
